service.name: Have I Been Pwned API
service.description_for_ai: Check if email or password has been compromised in data breaches. 12B+ compromised accounts in database. Free to check emails. Use for security awareness, account protection checks.

capabilities.description_for_ai: Check if an email address was found in any known data breach. Returns list of breaches.

truncateResponse.description: Return only breach names if true

capabilities.description_for_ai: Check if a password has appeared in any data breach. Uses k-anonymity — only sends first 5 chars of SHA-1 hash, never the full password.

hash_prefix.description: First 5 chars of SHA-1 hash of password

agent_hints.password_privacy: Never send full password to API. Hash with SHA-1, take first 5 chars, send those. Check if full hash is in response.
agent_hints.free: Password check endpoint is completely free and uses k-anonymity for privacy.
